patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/472

When `pm create` rejects an item because the type has required custom fields, include the required field names (and expected types) in the structured error instead of a generic message, saving agents a `pm schema` round-trip.

Related: pm-qmjx (GH-441 type-aware create help mislabels required flags) — same required-fields metadata source should power both help and error paths.
GH-472: create error for missing required custom fields lists the field names

Dogfood GH-472: creating an item whose type has required custom fields fails without naming the missing fields, costing agents a pm schema round-trip. Duplicate check: searched create required fields error — pm-qmjx (GH-441) covers the create --help required-list mislabeling; this is the runtime error path, related but distinct.

pm create failure for missing required type-specific fields names each missing field (and expected type/format) in the error and recovery examples; consistent across strict and progressive create-mode; covered by specs
